name: Jason Byrne
bio: Jason Byrne is an Irish stand-up comedian known for a high-energy, physical and improvisational style built heavily on audience interaction. A regular at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe since the late 1990s, he has hosted radio and television shows in Ireland and the UK. His BBC Radio 2 programme won a Gold Sony Radio Award for Best Comedy.

timeline.ev: Finalist in So You Think You're Funny
Nominated for Perrier Best Newcomer Award
Gold Sony Radio Award for The Jason Byrne Show
Appears on Live at the Apollo

accolades: Gold Sony Radio Academy Award for Best Comedy 2011

bits.t: Spent His Childhood Freezing To Death
